$note: When an invoice record is created, generate an XRechnung XML invoice and save it to Directus Files. Assumes an 'invoices' collection whose records carry the invoice payload; the operation reads it from the trigger via {{ $trigger.payload.invoice }}. Load it with: DIRECTUS_URL=... DIRECTUS_TOKEN=... node examples/import.mjs generate-xrechnung-from-record.flow.json. beliq generates the compliant document; transmission (Peppol), archiving and reporting are separate. Add your key as the BELIQ_API_KEY env var (or set the operation's API Key).

flow.name: beliq - Record to XRechnung
flow.description: Turn a new invoice record into a compliant XRechnung XML invoice.
